PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?champion ?championLabel WHERE {
  ?championship wdt:P31 wd:Q191548 ; rdfs:label ?title .
  FILTER(LANG(?title) = 'en' && CONTAINS(LCASE(?title) , 'cruiserweight'))
  .
  ?championship wdt:P2223 ?champion .
  ?champion rdfs:label ?championLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?championLabel) = 'en')
  .
}
